channel.title: We Work Remotely
channel.description: The best remote jobs for engineers, designers, marketers, and more.

item.title: Acme Corp: Senior Backend Engineer
item.description: We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our distributed team. Experience with Python and PostgreSQL required.

item.title: Globex: Product Designer
item.description: Design beautiful interfaces for our SaaS product. Figma experience a must.

item.title: Full Stack Developer Wanted
item.description: No agencies please. Must know React and Node.js.
